description.value: You twist not just the visual, but the auditory as well, allowing you to pass without a sound and create minor noises as distractions—perfect for misdirection and infiltration. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Silence] on yourself as a 2nd-rank innate occult spell and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Ventriloquism] as a 1st-rank innate occult spell, each once per day. You also can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Figment] as an innate occult cantrip. You become trained in the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics, and your key spellcasting attribute for alter ego archetype spells is Charisma.
